title: clusia hirsuta
intro: Clusia hirsuta, also known as the hairy clusia, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub or small tree with medicinal properties, including its leaves, roots, and bark, which are used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Clusia hirsuta include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
